_comment: TEMPLATE — per-bidder qualitative category OVERRIDES (the human-input checkpoint). Pass with --overrides. Keys are the DISPLAYED bidder name (after any --aliases is applied). For each bidder supply any of the 8 categories: pricing, scope, condo_exp, co_risk, reputation, financial, controls, docs. 'score' is 1-10, 'by' = who set it (analyst/LLM/source), 'note' = evidence. Pricing + CO-Risk are mechanically seeded by the skill; the four external categories (condo_exp, reputation, financial, controls) start null + 'ANALYST INPUT REQUIRED' and are NEVER invented — supply them here. 100% coverage across all scored bidders is required before the Overall presentation curve can be applied. Replace the placeholder bidders below.
